task.title: Add source_msg_id lint check in guard.ts

messages.content: ✅ committed c9d442d: feat: lint check — require source_msg_id on delegate_task calls

DONE (commit c9d442d). Added to `src/hooks/guard.ts` in `guard()`, before the `guardReason()` call:

- Checks `tool === 'mcp__synapse-bus__delegate_task'`
- If `source_msg_id` key is absent from `input`, immediately `deny()` with a descriptive message telling the agent to pass either a message ID or `null`
- If key is present (any value including `null`), `allow()` early — skips the destructive Bash / sensitive path checks entirely

`npm run build` clean.
